_comment: Q1-2026 initiatives — completed history with outcomes. The two 'slipped' items (SIG-01, PLT-02) were carried into Q2-2026. This is the ground truth the Eng Agent cites when resisting over-commitment in Q3 planning.

initiatives.name: Rate Limiting v1
initiatives.kr: P99 ingest latency < 200ms at 10k req/s; reject burst > configured ceiling.
initiatives.notes: Scope grew in week 5 when we discovered the original token-bucket design broke under multi-region fanout. +80h over plan.

initiatives.name: Payload Schema Validation
initiatives.kr: Reject malformed events at ingest with structured error codes; <1ms added latency.
initiatives.notes: Blocked behind Q1-ING-01's slip. Came in healthy once unblocked.

initiatives.name: Retry Engine Rewrite
initiatives.kr: Exponential backoff with jitter; per-endpoint retry budgets; P95 delivery < 500ms.
initiatives.notes: Came in on plan — the one bright spot of the quarter.

initiatives.name: Signature Verification v1
initiatives.kr: HMAC-SHA256 signatures on every outbound webhook; rotate-able signing keys.
initiatives.notes: SLIPPED to Q2. Delivery team was saturated by the retry-engine follow-on work (post-launch hardening). Only 80h of 360 done in Q1. Carried to Q2-DLV-01.

initiatives.name: Event Search MVP
initiatives.kr: Search events by payload, endpoint, status within a 30-day window; <300ms query.

initiatives.name: API Keys & Permissions
initiatives.kr: Scoped API keys (read/write/admin); rotate + revoke; audit log per key.
initiatives.notes: SLIPPED to Q2. Jonas pulled onto Event Search MVP support in weeks 9-12. Only 60h of 360 done in Q1. Carried to Q2-PLT-01.
